failure_story: Gross collective acreage and project values are attributed to shareholders despite related-entity ownership, cancellable leases, parcel overlap, water restrictions, and illiquid related-party claims; realization takes far longer and costs more than modeled.
earliest_warning_signals: Lease cash fails to convert from development to operating terms.
Related-party receivables decline or new related-party debt grows.
No parcel or water-right evidence emerges while option values rise.
forensic_checks: Trace every entity, ownership percentage, partner waterfall, and remittance.
Map lease/project footprints and residual parcels.
Obtain water-title, transfer, engineering, capex, demand, and adjudication records.
Stress note collectability, railway value, tax, and OTC liquidity.
unresolved_items: No project-level ownership and partner waterfall converts gross economics to per-share cash.
No parcel-level map supports a non-overlapping residual-acre balance.
No legal/engineering record supports transferable water quantity, delivery economics, and dated realization.
Related-party note collectability and railway realizability remain insufficiently tested.
